intro.content:
Ok — let’s check your Jawa cloth cloak.

There are 5 known cloth cloak types, and they can be difficult to identify precisely without direct visual comparison.

cloak_info.content:
Key differences include:

• Hood size and shape
• Material texture
• Colour tone
• Stitching and cut

For accurate identification, use the full Variant Villain guide:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-cloak/

next_action.content:
